title: Zambia opts out of IMF ECF extension, shifts focus to growth agenda
summary: IN a bid to strengthen fiscal discipline while advancing broader economic priorities, Zambia has decided not to seek a one-year extension of its International Monetary Fund (IMF) Extended Credit Facility (ECF) programme, Finance Minister Situmbeko Musokotwane said.

title: Ministry of Mines denies suspending tenement allocations at Kikonge gold mine
